name: Boo Men
short_description: Boo Men is a 1-4 player online co-op horror game. You and your crew of burglars are tasked with stealing from ghosts. Just remember to stay in the light because you never know what could be lurking in the dark...
detailed_description:
You are a thief tasked with burglarizing homes. You are given a list of items required to steal before you can leave. Play with a team and split the prize money or play solo and keep it all for yourself, but it won't be that easy. Boo Men can be lurking in the dark, so stay in the light if you want to survive. This means keeping an eye on the power. The more lights you turn on, the faster it will drain the power and cause a power outage in which case you will need to locate the breaker to turn back on. Take caution -A Boo Man may be hiding in the light, waiting for someone to turn it off...

1-4 Player Online Co-op

Play by yourself or up to 4 burglars! The game will adjust itself accordingly based on the number of players!

PvP

Play as the Boo Man against your friends and up to 5 players! Each Boo Man has their own set of unique abilities to learn and master!

Replay-ability

There are 8 different Boo Men, each with their own unique play-style. 8 maps to burglarize, ranging from small-medium-large. 5 Difficulties, randomized spawn locations, and customized games which allow you to also add multiple of any Boo Men for endless combinations of chaotic entertainment!

In-game Market

What good is stealing money if you have nothing to spend it on? Buy yourself some fancy new burglar masks, access to richer houses with larger payouts, or perks to help you with your heist!

Proximity Voice Chat

In-game voice chat to add to the realism! Hear your friend scream or call out to them to make sure they are still alive! Just be weary of what else could be listening...
